name: motion-progressive-blur
title: Progressive Blur
author: Motion Primitives
description: Builds a directional blur overlay from layered masks.

changes: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils for source-batch and install-target portability.
Added a zero-duration useReducedMotion transition override for caller-supplied motion props.
Marked generated blur layers as decorative.

modifications.change: Changed the local utility import, snapped optional motion props for reduced motion, and hid decorative layers from assistive technology.
modifications.reason: Resolve the copied helper and keep the static blur readable without exposing or animating its generated layers.
